message: The provider-exception ledger (.engine/policies/provider-exceptions.json) does not match its format — an entry is missing its reason, its sanctioning decision record, or its missing-or-weaker declaration (the exact problem is named just above). The ledger is the only sanctioned home for a runtime difference, so a malformed entry would let an undeclared gap ride; every entry carries a plain-language reason and the decision record that sanctions it (see provider-exceptions.v1.json).
